script_text: Little endings can change what a word means.
They tell us how many, or when.
Let us meet three of the most common ones.
The S ending means more than one.
Dog becomes dogs. Apple becomes apples.
The ending E D means it already happened.
The ending I N G means happening right now.
Look at the last letters. The ending tells you when or how many!
Now you are ready to read word endings!
